common_cold.advice: Rest, drink fluids, and take paracetamol if needed.

malaria.advice: Consult a doctor immediately and get a blood test.

flu.advice: Rest, drink fluids, antiviral medications may help if taken early.

covid_19.advice: Get tested, isolate, monitor symptoms, contact healthcare provider if worsening.

tuberculosis.advice: See a doctor immediately for TB testing and chest X-ray.

pneumonia.advice: Consult a doctor for chest X-ray, may require antibiotics.

asthma.advice: Use inhaler as prescribed, avoid triggers, see doctor if worsening.

diabetes_type_1.advice: Consult an endocrinologist for insulin therapy and blood glucose monitoring.

diabetes_type_2.advice: Manage with diet, exercise, and medications; monitor blood glucose regularly.

hypertension.advice: Monitor blood pressure, reduce sodium intake, exercise, consult doctor for medication.

migraine.advice: Rest in a dark room, apply cold compress, take pain relief medication.

anxiety_disorder.advice: Practice relaxation techniques, seek therapy, consult doctor if severe.

depression.advice: Consult a mental health professional, therapy and medication may help.

gastroenteritis.advice: Rest, drink oral rehydration solution, avoid solid foods initially.

irritable_bowel_syndrome.advice: Manage with diet changes, stress reduction, consult gastroenterologist.

ulcer.advice: Consult doctor for proton pump inhibitors, avoid spicy foods.

arthritis.advice: Physical therapy, pain management, anti-inflammatory medications.

osteoporosis.advice: Increase calcium intake, exercise, get bone density test.

anemia.advice: Get blood tests, increase iron-rich foods, may need supplements.

thyroid_disease.advice: Get thyroid function tests (TSH), consult endocrinologist.

eczema.advice: Moisturize regularly, avoid triggers, use prescribed creams.

psoriasis.advice: Dermatologist consultation, topical treatments, avoid triggers.

acne.advice: Cleanse regularly, use acne medication, consult dermatologist if severe.

urinary_tract_infection.advice: Drink plenty of water, consult doctor for antibiotics.

kidney_stones.advice: Stay hydrated, pain management, consult urologist.

liver_disease.advice: Consult hepatologist, liver function tests, avoid alcohol.

heart_disease.advice: Seek emergency care immediately, get ECG and blood tests.

stroke.advice: Call emergency services immediately, time is critical.

cancer.advice: Consult oncologist immediately, get imaging and biopsy.

lactose_intolerance.advice: Avoid dairy products or use lactase enzyme supplements.

food_allergy.advice: Identify and avoid allergen, carry epinephrine auto-injector if severe.

hayfever.advice: Use antihistamines, nasal sprays, avoid allergen exposure.

asthma_allergy_related.advice: Use bronchodilator inhalers, avoid triggers, consult doctor.

whooping_cough.advice: Consult doctor for antibiotics, ensure vaccination.

measles.advice: Isolate, rest, supportive care, ensure vaccination.

chickenpox.advice: Calamine lotion for itching, rest, pain relief, ensure vaccination.

shingles.advice: Consult doctor for antiviral medication, pain management.

bronchitis.advice: Rest, fluids, cough suppressants, consult doctor.

pharyngitis.advice: Rest, warm beverages, throat lozenges, antibiotics if bacterial.

sinusitis.advice: Nasal saline rinse, decongestants, antibiotics if bacterial.

otitis_media.advice: Pain relief, warm compress, consult doctor for antibiotics.

conjunctivitis.advice: Warm compress, eye drops, proper hygiene, consult doctor.

glaucoma.advice: Regular eye exams, medicated eye drops, consult ophthalmologist.

cataracts.advice: Consult ophthalmologist for surgery if vision significantly affected.

macular_degeneration.advice: Consult ophthalmologist, vitamin supplementation may help.

diabetic_retinopathy.advice: Manage diabetes tightly, regular eye exams, consult ophthalmologist.

vertigo.advice: Rest, avoid sudden movements, consult doctor.

Meniere_disease.advice: Reduce salt intake, consult ENT specialist.

tinnitus.advice: Identify triggers, white noise, consult audiologist.

hearing_loss.advice: Get audiogram, hearing aids or cochlear implants, consult audiologist.

osteoarthritis.advice: Physical therapy, pain management, weight management.

gout.advice: Rest, ice, pain relief, reduce purine intake, consult doctor.

fibromyalgia.advice: Exercise, pain management, stress reduction, consult specialist.

chronic_fatigue_syndrome.advice: Rest, graded exercise, cognitive behavioral therapy.

sciatica.advice: Physical therapy, pain relief, stretching exercises.

herniated_disc.advice: Rest, physical therapy, consult orthopedic surgeon.

scoliosis.advice: Back brace or surgery depending on severity, physical therapy.

carpal_tunnel_syndrome.advice: Wrist brace, rest, anti-inflammatory medication, surgery if severe.

tennis_elbow.advice: Rest, ice, physical therapy, anti-inflammatory medication.

frozen_shoulder.advice: Physical therapy, gentle stretching, heat therapy.

plantar_fasciitis.advice: Stretching, night splints, ice, proper footwear.

symptoms: bony bump at big toe base
bunions.advice: Proper footwear, toe exercises, surgery if severe.

varicose_veins.advice: Compression stockings, leg elevation, consult vascular surgeon.

deep_vein_thrombosis.advice: Seek emergency care immediately, get ultrasound.

arrhythmia.advice: Consult cardiologist, ECG monitoring, may need medication.

angina.advice: Rest, take nitroglycerine if prescribed, seek medical attention.

hemophilia.advice: Consult hematologist, clotting factor replacement therapy.

thalassemia.advice: Blood transfusions, iron chelation therapy, consult hematologist.

bipolar_disorder.advice: Consult psychiatrist for mood stabilizers, therapy, regular mood monitoring.

schizophrenia.advice: Consult psychiatrist immediately, antipsychotic medications, hospitalization if acute.

ocd.advice: Cognitive behavioral therapy, SSRIs, consult psychiatrist.

ptsd.advice: Trauma-focused CBT, EMDR therapy, consult mental health professional.

generalized_anxiety_disorder.advice: Cognitive behavioral therapy, relaxation techniques, medication if needed.

panic_disorder.advice: Breathing exercises, CBT, medication, avoid triggers.

social_anxiety_disorder.advice: Cognitive behavioral therapy, exposure therapy, medication.

specific_phobia.advice: Exposure therapy, cognitive behavioral therapy, relaxation techniques.

anorexia_nervosa.advice: Consult eating disorder specialist, nutritionist, psychiatrist, possible hospitalization.

bulimia_nervosa.advice: Cognitive behavioral therapy, nutritionist support, consult psychiatrist.

binge_eating_disorder.advice: Behavioral therapy, nutritionist, support groups, avoid diet culture.

adhd.advice: Stimulant medications, behavioral therapy, structured routines.

autism_spectrum_disorder.advice: Speech therapy, behavioral support, accommodations, consult developmental specialist.

seasonal_affective_disorder.advice: Light therapy, vitamin D supplements, outdoor exposure, therapy.

insomnia.advice: Sleep hygiene improvements, cognitive behavioral therapy for insomnia, relaxation techniques.

sleep_apnea.advice: Sleep study, CPAP machine, weight management, consult sleep specialist.

substance_use_disorder.advice: Rehab programs, support groups (AA, NA), counseling, medication-assisted treatment.

burnout.advice: Take breaks, set boundaries, seek counseling, lifestyle changes.

borderline_personality_disorder.advice: Dialectical behavior therapy, psychiatry consultation, support groups.

narcissistic_personality_disorder.advice: Individual therapy difficult, group therapy, consult mental health professional.

antisocial_personality_disorder.advice: Legal/court-ordered therapy, behavioral programs, structured environment.

dissociative_identity_disorder.advice: Trauma-focused therapy, psychiatry consultation, safe environment.

adjustment_disorder.advice: Therapy, support groups, stress management, time and support.

prolonged_grief_disorder.advice: Grief counseling, support groups, therapy, allow time to process.

complicated_grief.advice: Bereavement therapy, psychiatry consultation, support networks.

major_depressive_episode.advice: Antidepressants, psychotherapy, crisis hotline if suicidal.

bipolar_depression.advice: Mood stabilizers, antidepressants, psychiatry consultation, hospitalization if acute.

perinatal_depression.advice: Consult OB-GYN and psychiatrist, safe medications during pregnancy, support groups.

premenstrual_dysphoric_disorder.advice: Hormonal contraceptives, SSRIs, lifestyle changes, track symptoms.

anxiety_in_elderly.advice: Low-dose anxiety medications, therapy, address medical issues, maintain activity.
